steps.title: Find the roots
steps.content: By the zero-product property, $3x(x-4)(x+6)=0$ requires one factor to be zero. That gives $x=0$, $x=4$, or $x=-6$.

steps.title: Identify a valid solution
steps.content: Among the choices, $0$ is a root of the equation. That matches Choice B — 0. The remaining listed values do not make any factor equal zero.
